problem id: 6686f0de
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  11110110 -> 01111110
  01111001 -> 10011111
  01110001 -> 00011110
  11001001 -> 10001001
  11100010 -> 00111100
  11011100 -> 11011011
  00101101 -> 11010101
  00111000 -> 10000111
  11111111 -> 11101111
  11010110 -> 01111010

query: 00111011
predicted answer: 10110111
